caption: A mirrored scene depicts a vast crowd of yellow-skinned characters in a simulated environment. The image is split horizontally, showing two identical rows of figures. In each row, a line of characters stands in the foreground against a backdrop of thousands of identical yellow figures engulfed in orange and yellow flames. The foreground characters wear various casual and formal clothes; one man wears a blue suit, another a green shirt with blue pants, and several women wear simple dresses. They are standing side-by-side, some with arms slightly raised or gesturing. The background is a dense mass of figures and fire that extends upward toward a dark ceiling. There is no movement or change between the mirrored sections, as the top half is a reflection of the bottom half, creating a symmetrical composition of a surreal, flaming crowd.
